title: run: fix hang when using run
body:
make the stdin pipe not blocking, so that it won't hang if the other
end is not reading from it.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1664

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@giuseppe 
Looks like you need to make a function somewhere to avoid gofmt cycle issues:
```
# Run gofmt on version 1.11 and higher
run_linux.go:1052::warning: cyclomatic complexity 46 of function runCopyStdio() is high (> 45) (gocyclo)
Makefile:66: recipe for target 'validate' failed
make: *** [validate] Error 1
```
looks like a network flake killed it, will spin again.
